auth.rememberPasswordHint: Use "Remember password" only on your private device.

users.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this user?

llm.title: LLM Configuration
llm.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this?
llm.createFirst: Add your first provider to get started

dashboard.focusSubtitle: Put the next meaningful learning step first, and keep metrics and tools in the background.
dashboard.quickActionTitle: Jump into the flows you use most
dashboard.momentumDescription: A compact view of whether your learning is moving forward or stalling out.
dashboard.reviewQueueReady: You have {count} reviews ready to clear
dashboard.reviewQueueDescription: Clearing due reviews before new work keeps the learning loop steady.
dashboard.resumeLatestProblemDescription: If the next move is unclear, push one concrete problem forward first.
dashboard.modelLibraryDescription: Capture stable understanding into model cards so review and transfer have real material to work with.
dashboard.exploreInWorkspaceDescription: Ask inside ProblemDetail for "{title}" so exploration stays tied to the learning path.
dashboard.exploreInWorkspaceFallback: Start from a problem so concept exploration stays attached to a real learning turn.
dashboard.reviewRecommendation: Recommended now: generate a {type} review for {period}
dashboard.retrievalDescription: A compact view of what context retrieval is pulling in, so retrieval stops being a black box.
dashboard.noRetrievalHits: No context hits for this event

problems.title: Problems
problems.createFirst: Create your first problem to start learning
problems.createTimeout: Problem creation timed out. Please try again.
problems.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this problem?

problemDetail.title: Problem Details
problemDetail.noLearningPath: Learning path is not available yet
problemDetail.progressInputLabel: Your understanding and attempts at this step
problemDetail.progressInputPlaceholder: Write what you understood, what you tried, and where you got stuck
problemDetail.completedAll: All steps are completed. Review your history and consolidate a model card.
problemDetail.modeSocraticHint: Respond to the current step and let the system evaluate whether you should progress.
problemDetail.modeExplorationHint: Ask about a concept in the current step and use the answer to discover related ideas.
problemDetail.turnResultSubtitleSocratic: See whether this answer advanced mastery, created concepts, or opened new paths.
problemDetail.turnResultSubtitleExploration: See what this exploration turn explained, derived, and suggested next.
problemDetail.noTurnResultSocratic: Submit a Socratic answer to see mastery and next-step results here.
problemDetail.noTurnResultExploration: Ask an exploration question to see explanation artifacts here.
problemDetail.askSubtitle: You can ask questions at any time during learning, and the answer is grounded in the current step.
problemDetail.askInputPlaceholder: For example: Why should we use F1 instead of only accuracy on imbalanced data?
problemDetail.conceptGovernanceSubtitle: Review, confirm, or rollback concept updates before they affect your long-term knowledge map.
problemDetail.derivedConceptsSubtitle: Review concept candidates in the same learning turn where they appeared, and decide whether they belong in your knowledge model.
problemDetail.derivedConceptSourceResponse: Derived from your answer in this step
problemDetail.derivedConceptSourceAsk: Derived from your exploration question in this step
problemDetail.sourceTurnUnavailable: This candidate was created earlier and the turn preview is unavailable.
problemDetail.handoffHintPromoteConcepts: Promote accepted concepts into model cards from the derived concepts panel.
problemDetail.handoffHintReviewPendingConcepts: Review pending concept candidates before they become long-term knowledge.
problemDetail.handoffHintReviewPathSuggestions: Decide how to place the suggested learning paths below.
problemDetail.pathCandidatesSubtitle: Turns can suggest prerequisite, comparison, or deep-dive paths before you decide how to place them.
problemDetail.guidedLine3: What I am still unsure about:
problemDetail.autoAdvanced: This step is considered mastered and has been advanced automatically.
problemDetail.autoAdvanceUndone: Auto-advance was undone. You can keep refining this step.

modelCards.title: Model Cards
modelCards.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this model card?

practice.title: Practice
practice.secondaryHeading: Use practice as a supporting drill surface, not as the main learning loop
practice.secondaryMessage: ProblemDetail, Model Cards, and Reviews carry the main cognition-building flow. Practice remains available as a supporting place to rehearse or spot-check understanding.
practice.checkBack: Check back later for new challenges

reviews.title: Reviews
reviews.subtitle: Keep model cards, spaced repetition, and saved reflections in one lifecycle view.
reviews.focusModelCards: Recent model cards are ready to refine
reviews.reviewQueueHint: Clear the due queue first, then evolve the cards that changed most recently.
reviews.modelLifecycleHint: Open the card to refine notes, examples, counter-examples, and evolution history.

chat.title: Legacy Conversations
chat.selectConversation: Select a legacy conversation or start a new one
chat.legacyTitle: Standalone chat is outside the primary learning loop
chat.legacyMessage: Use ProblemDetail exploration for concept questions you want attached to a problem, its learning turns, and its derived paths. This page remains available only as a legacy conversation surface.

srs.title: Recall Session
srs.secondaryHeading: Use this page as a focused review session inside the broader review loop
srs.secondaryMessage: This page handles the active recall session itself. The broader planning, scheduling, and evolution loop still lives in Reviews and Model Cards.
srs.recallPrompt: Try to recall the key concepts of this model card

graph.title: Knowledge Graph
graph.secondaryHeading: Use this to inspect structure, not to drive the main loop
graph.secondaryMessage: The primary learning loop stays in Problems, Review, and Model Cards. Use the graph only when you need a structural view across those assets.
graph.noData: No model cards to visualize yet

challenges.title: Cognitive Challenges
challenges.secondaryHeading: Use this as an occasional stress test, not as the default review flow
challenges.secondaryMessage: Main review and consolidation now live in the Review hub and ProblemDetail. Challenges remain available as a secondary way to probe edge cases.
challenges.noChallenges: No challenges yet. Generate one to get started!

resources.title: Reference Archive
resources.secondaryHeading: Use this archive for supporting material, not as the primary learning workspace
resources.secondaryMessage: The core loop lives in Problems, ProblemDetail, Model Cards, and Reviews. Keep new supporting references attached there whenever possible.
resources.archiveSubtitle: Primary reference capture now lives inside ProblemDetail. This page is a secondary archive for general and problem-linked supporting material.
resources.urlPlaceholder: Enter a supporting article or video...
resources.noResources: No reference material yet. Add one to get started.
resources.workspaceSubtitle: Attach reference material to this problem so explanations and next actions stay grounded in supporting context.
resources.currentTurnContext: This reference is attached to the current turn and this problem.
resources.problemOnlyContext: This reference is attached to this problem.
resources.noProblemResources: No references attached to this problem yet.

notes.title: Annotation Archive
notes.secondaryHeading: Use this archive for annotations, not as the primary product surface
notes.secondaryMessage: The main learning activity belongs in ProblemDetail. Use this page only to revisit supporting annotations that were captured around problems and turns.
notes.archiveSubtitle: Primary annotation capture now lives inside ProblemDetail. This page is a secondary archive for general and problem-linked learning annotations.
notes.placeholder: Capture a short observation, misconception, or reminder...
notes.voiceNotSupported: Your browser does not support speech recognition
notes.noNotes: No annotations yet. Capture the first supporting note.
notes.workspaceSubtitle: Capture supporting context for this problem and, when available, for the current learning turn.
notes.currentTurnContext: This note is attached to the current turn and this problem.
notes.problemOnlyContext: This note is attached to this problem.
notes.noProblemNotes: No annotations attached to this problem yet.

cogTest.secondaryHeading: Use this for diagnosis, not for the main learning loop
cogTest.secondaryMessage: Cognitive tests stay available as a deeper diagnostic tool, but model cards and reviews remain the primary path for consolidation and evolution.
